docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHRIDGE COOPERATIVE HOMES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DENTLEY, ROSLYN DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
